steps.title: Identify the passage's progression
steps.content: The passage moves from broad to narrow: it opens with general scientific interest in shipwrecks' ecological effects, then focuses on one specific research team's study, and finally presents one specific finding from that study.

steps.title: Match the three-part structure to the choices
steps.content: Choice D correctly captures all three parts: it “notes a general scientific interest in shipwrecks' ecological effects” (the opening statement), “describes a specific study related to that interest” (the Mugge team's research), and “states one of the study's findings” (the 125-meter result). The other three choices either add information not in the passage, fail to capture the progression, or mischaracterize the text's content. That matches choice D — D is correct.
